description_long: This bungalow complex features multiple single-story structures with pitched, shingled roofs and wooden facades, arranged on a rectangular grassy plot. The main building is centrally located, flanked by two smaller wings and accompanied by two detached outbuildings, one of which appears to be a garage or shed. A small swimming pool is situated adjacent to the main building, with steps leading up to a covered porch area. Large windows and visible doors provide access and natural light, while the overall layout suggests a communal or family-oriented residential space. The roofs are gabled, and the buildings are set on a raised foundation with steps leading to the entrances. The grounds are open and landscaped, providing ample outdoor space around the structures.
description: A multi-structure bungalow complex with gabled roofs, wooden facades, a central porch, and a small pool, set on a landscaped grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central porch, and the alignment of the buildings along the plot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, the main building's facade, and the arrangement of the outbuildings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrances, the pool, and the spatial relationship between the main and auxiliary structures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the outbuildings, the side of the main bungalow, and the open grassy area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
